statusMessage: Your codebase is mapped. Almost live.

persona.name: Home Cook
persona.description: A young adult cooking at home with ingredients on hand but no clear plan. Wants one confident dinner recommendation — not a list to scroll through — in a friendly, conversational tone.

productAreas.name: Home
productAreas.description: Landing page where users choose how to input ingredients — type, snap a receipt, or photo the fridge.

productAreas.name: Ingredient Input
productAreas.description: Core data-entry step: add ingredients, set cooking time, and pick a meal vibe before generation.

productAreas.name: Recipe Generation & Viewing
productAreas.description: AI-powered recipe recommendation with hero image, ingredient lists, and step-by-step instructions.

productAreas.name: Saved Recipes
productAreas.description: Planned collection for bookmarking favorite dinner plans. Persistence coming in a future build.

productAreas.name: App Shell & Settings
productAreas.description: Cross-cutting header, navigation, theme toggle, and error handling on every page.

keyFlows.name: Core Recipe Flow: Ingredients to Recipe
keyFlows.description: The primary user journey — from ingredient input to viewing a generated dinner plan.

keyFlows.name: Re-roll: Make Something Else
keyFlows.description: User requests a different recipe with the same ingredients after seeing the first suggestion.

keyFlows.name: Edit Ingredients and Regenerate
keyFlows.description: User refines their ingredient list from the recipe view and generates again.

keyFlows.name: Error Recovery
keyFlows.description: Handles generation failures — network issues, rate limits, or invalid AI responses.

keyFlows.name: Missing State Recovery
keyFlows.description: Guards against empty or stale session state when navigating between pages.

signals.title: No in-app guides deployed yet
signals.description: 0 active guides across all five product areas — no onboarding or feature-discovery layer in the app today.
signals.whySurfaced: Novus mapped five product areas but found no guide entities. Signals for usage patterns will strengthen once more sessions flow through after install.

trackEvents.name: ingredients_submitted
trackEvents.description: User submits ingredient list with cooking time and vibe preferences to start recipe generation.

trackEvents.name: recipe_generated
trackEvents.description: AI successfully generates a recipe and navigates the user to the recipe view.

trackEvents.name: recipe_generation_failed
trackEvents.description: Recipe generation fails — API limits, invalid responses, or network errors.

trackEvents.name: recipe_rerolled
trackEvents.description: User taps "Make something else" for a new recipe with the same ingredients.

trackEvents.name: recipe_generation_retried
trackEvents.description: User taps "Try again" after a generation failure.

funnels.name: Home to Recipe Conversion
funnels.description: End-to-end flow from landing on Home to viewing a generated recipe — the core value chain.

funnels.name: Ingredient Configuration & Submission
funnels.description: How sessions move through the ingredient form — typing, adding items, and submitting.

funnels.name: Recipe Reroll
funnels.description: Sessions that request a different recipe with the same ingredients.

funnels.name: Generation Error Recovery
funnels.description: Whether sessions retry after a failed generation and reach a recipe.

funnels.name: Recipe Edit & Regenerate
funnels.description: Sessions that edit ingredients from a recipe and generate again.
